zh.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila於1070年出生。他和Maria Inga Anundsdotter至少有1個兒子。他去世於1132年享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila于1070年出生。他和Maria Inga Anundsdotter至少有1个儿子。他去世于1132年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: af
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from ay ‘Moon’, by extension also ‘beautiful face’.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 艾, see   Ai   2.

variants.name: Ai
meanings: Japanese: usually written 阿井 with characters used phonetically. The meaning could be ‘meeting’. In North America, it may also be a shortened form of some other name.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 艾, referring to ‘Chinese mugwort’, a type of plant used in traditional Chinese medical treatment: (i) perhaps from the second element of Ru Ai (汝艾), the name of an official who lived during the reign of Shao Kang, the 6th king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ai Ling (艾陵), the name of a hill (located in Shandong province), the fief of Ai Kong (艾孔), an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) from the placename Ai (艾), the name of a fief (located in Jiangxi province) which was granted to an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) adopted as a surname by the Qu Jin (去斤), Qu Ai (去艾), and Ai Jin (艾斤) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (v) from Ai (艾), the name of an ancient state (possibly in present-day Jiangxi province) during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 愛, meaning ‘love’ in Chinese: (i) said to be traced back to Ai Xie Wu (愛邪勿), prime minister of the state of Huihu (known as Uyghur Empire or Uyghur Khaganate), who was endowed with the surname Ai (愛) by Emperor Wuzong of Tang (814–846  AD ). (ii) a Han Chinese surname for some members of the Aisin Gioro family from the Manchu ethnic group, known as the royal family of the Qing dynasty (1616 – 1911  AD ). (iii) a surname from minority ethnic groups in Taiwan.

nameMeanings.name: Stenkil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Polish and Jewish (from Poland) Stencel , Czech Štencel or Štencl.

variants.name: Stencel
meanings: Polish and Jewish (from Poland); Czech (Štencel): from a German pet form (see Stenzel ) of the Slavic personal name Stanislav , Polish Stanisław. In North America, this surname may also be an altered form of the Czech variant Štencl. Compare Stencil .

en.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila was born in 1070. He had at least 1 son with Maria Inga Anundsdotter. He died in 1132, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila est né en 1070. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maria Inga Anundsdotter. Il est décédé en 1132, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila wurde 1070 geboren. Er hatte mit Maria Inga Anundsdotter mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1132 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila è nato il nel 1070. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maria Inga Anundsdotter. Morì nel 1132, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurilaは1070年に生まれた。彼はMaria Inga Anundsdotterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1132年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila(은)는 1070년 태어났다. 그는 Maria Inga Anundsdotter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1132년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila nasceu em 1070. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maria Inga Anundsdotter. Ele faleceu em 1132, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila родился в 1070 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maria Inga Anundsdotter. Он умер в 1132 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Stenkil Jägerhorn af Spurila nació en 1070. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Maria Inga Anundsdotter. Murió en 1132, a la edad de 62 años.
